name: Berry Yogurt Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------GRAHAM CRUST-----------------------
1. Combine 1 1/3 cups Graham cracker crumbs, 3 tablespoons sugar, and 1/3 cup melted butter or margarine in a bowl. Press mixture evenly into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes, then cool.
-----------------------MAIN RECIPE-----------------------
1. Pour yogurt into a cloth-lined strainer set over a deep bowl. Cover and chill at least 12 hours or up to the next day.
2. In a saucepan, combine 1/4 cup water with 1 package Unflavored gelatin. Let it soften for 5 minutes.
3. Stir the softened gelatin mixture until dissolved over low heat.
4. In a blender or food processor, blend drained yogurt, cottage cheese, sugar, lime juice (grated lime peel), and the softened gelatin mixture until smooth.
5. Pour the smooth mixture into the prepared graham cracker crust. Cover and chill in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours or up to the next day.
6. Top the chilled pie with sliced strawberries before serving.
